name: kqmd
description: qmd-compatible replacement distribution scaffold for Korean-focused search experiments

scripts.test:release-contract: vitest run test/cli-routing.test.ts test/query-runtime.test.ts test/owned-command-parity test/status-command.test.ts test/owned-search-behavior.test.ts test/owned-embedding-behavior.test.ts test/update-command.test.ts test/trusted-dependencies.test.ts test/path-compatibility.test.ts test/passthrough-contract.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.release:verify: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test:release-contract && bun run measure:kiwi-reliability && bun run release:artifact
